User Story: As a first-time visitor to / or /explore, I want a short intro so I understand what Orbital is.
Expected Behaviour: Base layout auto-opens IntroOverlay once (only on / and /explore), remembers dismissal in localStorage (fa_intro_seen), so returning visitors go straight to the data.

User Story: As any visitor, I want consistent fonts and a country drawer available everywhere.
Expected Behaviour: Base.astro loads Space Grotesk/Inter/JetBrains Mono, mounts IntroOverlay + CountryDetailDrawer once globally so any island can open them.

User Story: As a visitor on the globe/map pages, I want the page locked to the viewport (no scroll).
Expected Behaviour: fullscreen prop applies h-screen overflow-hidden to body on / and /map.

User Story: As a user, I want to switch between Globe and List while keeping my filters.
Expected Behaviour: SiteNav renders a Globe/List tab toggle; each href carries the live filter query string so filters persist across views.

User Story: As a user not on the globe, I want a Countries link.
Expected Behaviour: SiteNav shows the Countries link on every surface except current='globe'.

User Story: As a user, I want an About control to reopen the intro.
Expected Behaviour: SiteNav About button calls openIntro() to show the IntroOverlay dialog.

User Story: As a user, the active view/section should be visually indicated and accessible.
Expected Behaviour: Active tab gets aria-selected/aria-current and gradient styling.

User Story: As a desktop visitor to /, I want a 3D globe of every program filling the viewport.
Expected Behaviour: GlobeView renders globe.gl sampled into an ASCII layer; a pin per program; fills 100dvh.

User Story: As a visitor, I want a boot/loading sequence while the globe initializes.
Expected Behaviour: BootSequence types terminal lines incl. live count for ~2.4s then fades; respects prefers-reduced-motion.

User Story: As a visitor, I want the globe to auto-rotate and to toggle it.
Expected Behaviour: Auto-rotate on by default (off if reduced-motion); rotate button toggles and reflects pressed state.

User Story: As a visitor, I want to reset the view.
Expected Behaviour: Reset clears selection, flies to default POV, re-enables auto-rotate, reseeds rings.
Issues Found: reset() forces autoRotate=true even when prefers-reduced-motion is set, contradicting the reduced-motion default.
Phase3 Fix: reset() now only re-enables auto-rotate when not prefers-reduced-motion.

User Story: As a visitor, I want to drag to rotate and zoom with wheel/pinch.
Expected Behaviour: Drag rotate; custom wheel zoom on fine pointers; native pinch on coarse pointers; zoom clamped 185-560.

User Story: As a visitor, I want to click a program pin to see its details and fly there.
Expected Behaviour: Clicking a pin opens the orbit-overlay card, stops rotation, flies camera to the program.

User Story: As a visitor, I want to click a country to open its ecosystem profile.
Expected Behaviour: Clicking a country polygon with a profile opens the CountryDetailDrawer; suppressed 400ms after a marker press.

User Story: As a visitor, I want a country-name tooltip following my cursor.
Expected Behaviour: onPolygonHover shows the geo name in a cursor-pinned tooltip with clickable hint.

User Story: As a visitor, I want dense cities collapsed into a clickable minimap marker.
Expected Behaviour: Regions with >=3 programs show one off-coast city marker with a count; click opens its minimap and flies there.

User Story: As a visitor, I want a round city minimap dock (Leaflet) for dense cities.
Expected Behaviour: Minimap dock builds active city's Leaflet map lazily, fits bounds, tears down on close; empty-state for empty clusters.

User Story: As a visitor, I want a status legend I can toggle.
Expected Behaviour: Legend button toggles a legend listing STATUS_ORDER colors+labels.

User Story: As a visitor, I want a slide-in programs panel with search/filter/list.
Expected Behaviour: Panel: SiteNav, title, typewriter tagline, FilterSidebar, count, scrollable list; list click opens detail + flies; closes panel on mobile.

User Story: As a mobile visitor, I want a clear entry into the programs list.
Expected Behaviour: 'Enter the orbit' CTA shown at bottom on <=760px.

User Story: As a visitor without WebGL, I want a list-view fallback.
Expected Behaviour: hasWebGL() check; on failure shows fallback with a list-view link preserving the query string.

User Story: As a mobile visitor, I should not be blocked on WebGL.
Expected Behaviour: README/comment claim small screens redirect to List.
Issues Found: No small-screen redirect exists in GlobeView/index.astro; globe renders on mobile (works via touch + 'Enter the orbit'). The redirect claim in README/llms.txt/index comment is inaccurate.
Phase3 Fix: Corrected the stale claim in README/llms.txt (mobile gets the globe + list CTA, not a redirect).

User Story: As a visitor, I want pins to reflect live filter state.
Expected Behaviour: globePins recompute from shown on filter change.

User Story: As a user, I want to filter by living/working model with live counts.
Expected Behaviour: Model tabs (All/Co-living/Co-working/Both); counts reflect country selection; toggling a selected model clears it.

User Story: As a user, I want free-text search across name/city/country/focus/operator/type.
Expected Behaviour: Search updates filters.q; passes() matches lowercased haystack.

User Story: As a user, I want a typeahead multi-country picker with flags.
Expected Behaviour: CountryMultiSelect: type to suggest, keyboard nav, chips with remove, flags.

User Story: As a user who picked one country with a profile, I want a quick link to it.
Expected Behaviour: Single selected profile country shows a 'View <country>' drawer button.

User Story: As a dashboard user, I want status chips with counts.
Expected Behaviour: Status chips for statuses in the current model+country slice; toggle to filter; hidden on map/globe sidebars.

User Story: As a user, I want to copy a link to my exact filtered view.
Expected Behaviour: Copy-link writes location.href and shows a toast.

User Story: As an agent/user, I want a quick link to the JSON API from the dashboard filters.
Expected Behaviour: '{ } API' link to /api/programs.json (dashboard variant only).

User Story: As a user, my filters should sync to the URL and hydrate from it.
Expected Behaviour: Store mirrors to URL via replaceState; hydrates once; legacy single ?country still parses; removed params ignored.

User Story: As a user on /explore, I want trigger chips that apply filter presets.
Expected Behaviour: FounderTriggers (apply) applies a preset in place; active chip highlighted on match.

User Story: As a user, I want a result count and a responsive card grid.
Expected Behaviour: ExploreResults shows 'N of M' (aria-live) and a 1/2/3-col ProgramCard grid sorted by defaultSort.

User Story: As a user with no matches, I want a helpful empty state.
Expected Behaviour: Empty state card with loosen-filter copy + 'Add a house' link to /submit.

User Story: As a user, I want each program card to show what's known at a glance.
Expected Behaviour: Logo, name (links to /programs/slug), type/city/country, status badge, save button, highlight, badges, verified date.

User Story: As a user, I want to view details or apply/visit from a card.
Expected Behaviour: 'View details' opens drawer; CTA 'Apply' (applyUrl) or 'Visit' (url) in a new tab.

User Story: As a user, I want a detailed, accessible program drawer.
Expected Behaviour: aria-modal dialog; focus to close on open; Esc + scrim close.

User Story: As a user, I want clear CTAs in the drawer.
Expected Behaviour: Apply/Visit (+ separate Visit site when applyUrl), Open full page, Report update deep link.

User Story: As a user, I want honest quick facts that say Unknown when unverified.
Expected Behaviour: 12 facts; Unknown rendered italic.

User Story: As a user, I want Best-for, Notes and Sources with a freshness caveat.
Expected Behaviour: Best for, Notes, Sources (official + sourceUrls), last-checked caveat.

User Story: As a user/crawler, I want a full static page per program with schema.org.
Expected Behaviour: /programs/[slug] renders badges, CTAs, quick facts, what-you-get, notes, application window, sources w/ provenance, related; emits JSON-LD.

User Story: As a user, I want application-window detail when available.
Expected Behaviour: Window data shows derived status badge + per-window cards.

User Story: As a user, I want to save and report updates from the page.
Expected Behaviour: SaveButton (md) + Report update link; city links to /cities/slug.

User Story: As a user, I want to bookmark programs stored only on my device.
Expected Behaviour: SaveButton toggles slug in localStorage; aria-pressed; star fills; syncs across tabs.

User Story: As a user, I want to reach my /saved shortlist.
Expected Behaviour: A nav link to /saved so the shortlist (filled by the ubiquitous ☆ buttons) is reachable.
Issues Found: /saved page exists and SaveButton writes to it, NavCurrent includes 'saved', saved.astro passes current='saved' — but NO link to /saved exists anywhere in the UI. The shortlist is unreachable except by typing the URL.
Phase3 Fix: Added a 'Saved' link (with live count badge) to SiteNav, shown alongside Countries on non-globe surfaces.

User Story: As a founder, I want to choose guided intake or jump to search.
Expected Behaviour: Path chooser: guided vs link to /explore.
Issues Found: Functions correctly when reached, but /find-support was not linked from any nav/page (orphan).
Phase3 Fix: Added a 'Try guided discovery →' link in the /explore header so the guided-matching flow is reachable.

User Story: As a founder, I want a guided questionnaire (7 questions).
Expected Behaviour: One question/step, progress bar, Back/Skip/Start over, single/multi/tri, toggle-off on re-click.

User Story: As a founder, I want ranked, explained matches.
Expected Behaviour: Recommended ranked by score; MatchCard shows fit %, reasons, blockers, cautions, next step, freshness, CTAs.

User Story: As a founder, I want to see why programs were ruled out.
Expected Behaviour: Blocked programs in a collapsible <details> with their blockers.

User Story: As a founder with no answers, I want a sensible default.
Expected Behaviour: No answers => full directory ranked by trust/freshness + prompt to answer.

User Story: As a founder, I want shareable result links and to edit/restart.
Expected Behaviour: Answers sync to URL; deep link jumps to results; copy toast; Edit/Start over.

User Story: As a founder where everything is ruled out, I want guidance.
Expected Behaviour: recommended=0 shows 'Every program was ruled out' + Adjust CTA.

User Story: As a founder, I want deterministic, auditable scoring.
Expected Behaviour: scoreProgram: hard disqualifiers then weighted soft reasons/cautions normalized 0-100; deterministic.

User Story: As a contributor, I want to submit a new program or an update.
Expected Behaviour: new/update toggle; prefill from URL; required name; builds + opens a prefilled GitHub issue; popup-blocked fallback link.

User Story: As a contributor, the issue should go to the project's GitHub repo.
Expected Behaviour: buildIssueUrl targets the correct repo issues/new.
Issues Found: REPO='jcobrew/founder-atlas' while the git remote is 'jcobrew/orbital'. Consistent across all docs; likely a rename so GitHub redirects old->new. Works but relies on the redirect.
Phase3 Fix: Left as-is (consistent with all docs + working via GitHub rename redirect). Noted for maintainer.

User Story: As a relocating founder, I want a grid of country ecosystem profiles.
Expected Behaviour: /countries lists CountryGridCard per country; ItemList JSON-LD.

User Story: As a user, clicking a country card opens its drawer (no-JS fallback).
Expected Behaviour: Click intercept opens drawer; real href preserved for SEO/no-JS.

User Story: As a founder, I want the two curated official portals first.
Expected Behaviour: Drawer: flag/region/summary, Start-here portals (or coming-soon), houses link, filter link, jump to other countries, caveat.

User Story: As a founder, I want a full country page with programs by city.
Expected Behaviour: Start-here portals, programs list (city chips when >1), highlights, caveat; Country JSON-LD; redirect if invalid slug.

User Story: As a founder, I want a per-city page of programs.
Expected Behaviour: City header (country link if profile), living-model mix, filter link, program list; ItemList JSON-LD.

User Story: As a user, I want a 2D Leaflet map of programs with popups.
Expected Behaviour: /map: dark Leaflet map, pins, popups, legend, sidebar list (filter + fly+popup).
Issues Found: /map is not linked from the nav (by design per README) — reachable only by URL.
Phase3 Fix: Left unlinked (intentional per README: map backs the globe minimaps).

User Story: As a user, I want dense regions shown as off-coast callout insets.
Expected Behaviour: Clusters >=3 render off-coast cards w/ leader line; covered markers hidden at low zoom; insets hidden when zoomed in or anchor off-screen.

User Story: As a user, map markers should reflect filters.
Expected Behaviour: Marker opacity/visibility toggled and insets rebuilt on filter change.

User Story: As an agent/power-user, I want a sortable URL-navigable table.
Expected Behaviour: /dashboard: FilterSidebar + sortable ProgramsTable (sort/dir to URL), count, ItemList JSON-LD, agent footer.

User Story: As an agent, I want every advertised filter param to actually work.
Expected Behaviour: Dashboard honors the query params documented in llms.txt/README/footer.
Issues Found: Docs (llms.txt, README, dashboard footer) advertise type/canonicalType/focus/format/stage/sector/housing params, but filtersFromURL+passes only honor q/model/country/status (+sort/dir). The real 'model' axis is undocumented; the advertised type/focus/etc. silently do nothing.
Phase3 Fix: Updated llms.txt, dashboard footer and README to document the actual supported params (q, model, country, status, sort, dir) and drop the removed ones.

User Story: As an agent, I want the unified program dataset as JSON.
Expected Behaviour: /api/programs.json: programs + meta + schema + count + facets; permissive CORS.

User Story: As an agent, I want country profiles as JSON.
Expected Behaviour: /api/countries.json: countries with programCount + meta.

User Story: As an agent, I want taxonomy, normalized, MVP, founder-needs schema, update report.
Expected Behaviour: /api/program-types, programs.normalized, programs.mvp, founder-needs-schema, update-report all render.

User Story: As an agent/LLM, I want an accurate plain-text index.
Expected Behaviour: /llms.txt describes project, schema, status enum, endpoints, dashboard query grammar correctly.
Issues Found: llms.txt advertises dead dashboard/explore params (type/focus/format/stage/sector/housing) and a mobile 'redirect' that doesn't exist; omits the real 'model' param.
Phase3 Fix: llms.txt corrected: documents q/model/country/status/sort, removes dead params and the redirect claim.

User Story: As a user, I want program logos with graceful fallback.
Expected Behaviour: Logo tries self-hosted->DuckDuckGo->Google favicon, then initials; fade-in.

User Story: As a user, I want an accurate About page.
Expected Behaviour: /about: hero, CTAs, FounderTriggers, type explainer, how-to-use, submit CTA, data&trust links.
Issues Found: 'How to use it' says filters carry across 'Globe, Map and List' but the nav toggle is only Globe/List (Map is not in the toggle).
